basis: Created because the mission brief names agent-release-readiness.json but no such file existed in docs/wiki before this bottleneck pass.

readinessBlockers.summary: Older append-only records still contain superseded source/Vanilla patched claims; current source snapshot says the disputed cleanup lanes are unpatched or opportunity-only.
readinessBlockers.nextAction: Keep current-source truth centralized and require direct source+Vanilla evidence plus OA smoke before patched wording returns.

readinessBlockers.summary: PVF dispatch, ICBM RequestSpecial and side-supply authority remain open hardening work.
readinessBlockers.nextAction: Use agent-hardening-backlog.jsonl and Pending-Owner-Decisions.md; do not claim public-server readiness before owner-approved patches and negative tests.

readinessBlockers.summary: Commander, factory, paratrooper, skill init, hosted FPS, supply scan and WASP marker lanes require Arma 2 OA smoke after source patches.
readinessBlockers.nextAction: Patch source Chernarus first, propagate generated Vanilla where applicable, then record hosted/dedicated/JIP smoke.

readinessBlockers.summary: Docs validation and wiki parity gates exist but must be run after each docs/wiki sync.
readinessBlockers.nextAction: Run docs/validate-wiki.ps1, Tools/TestWikiParity.ps1 and mirror Tools/ValidateWiki.ps1 -SkipGitDiffCheck after sync.

validationGates: Tools/ValidateWiki.ps1 -SkipGitDiffCheck in the mirror after sync
